info.title: Azure Migrate Assessment Service
info.description: Azure Migrate Resource Provider management API.

get.description: List the operations for the provider

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

post.summary: Get download URL for the business case report.
post.description: Get the URL for downloading the business case in a report format.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The content of the action request

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.name: overviewSummaryName
parameters.description: Gets the Name of the Overview Summary.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

monitoringSettings.description: Gets the azure arc monitoring settings.

AzureArcSettings.description: Azure arc settings for a business case.

azureArcState.description: AzureArc state indicates whether to include azure arc related costs in on-premises or not.

laborCostPercentage.description: Gets Azure arc labour cost percentage.

AzureResourceProperties.description: Common properties for all azure tracked and proxy resources.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

AzureSettings.description: Azure settings for a business case.

performanceDataStartTime.description: Gets start time to use for performance.

performanceDataEndTime.description: Gets end time to use for performance.

perYearMigrationCompletionPercentage.description: Gets migration completion percentage per year.

savingsOption.description: Gets the business case savings option type.

sqlAzureSettings.description: Gets and Sets Sql Azure Settings.

licensingProgram.description: Gets or sets the licensing program.

subscriptionId.description: Gets or sets the subscription ID for licensing program selected.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

BusinessCaseListResult.description: The response of a BusinessCase list operation.

value.description: The BusinessCase items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

version.description: The version of the business case.

reportStatusDetails.description: Gets the state of business case reports.

dependentAssessmentIds.description: Arm id of dependent partner assessments.

values.name: Tagging
values.description: In entities getting tagged on static data state.

scope1.description: Scope 1 emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent (MTCO2e).

scope2.description: Scope 2 emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent (MTCO2e).

scope3.description: Scope 3 emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent (MTCO2e).

compute.description: The compute emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent (MTCO2e).

storage.description: The storage emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent (MTCO2e).

targetLocation.description: Location/region that the business case is stored.

assessmentProjectId.description: The assessment project ID that this business case is linked to.

businessCaseType.description: The business case type. Can be only IAAS, optimize for PAAS and optimize for cost.

workloadDiscoverySource.description: The workload discovery source i.e. Appliance or Import.

CostComponentCategory.description: Represents the category of a cost component.

CostComponentType.description: Represents the type of cost component.

CostLineItem.description: Represents a single line item in a cost breakdown.

pillar.description: Gets or sets the pillar this cost belongs to.

name.description: Gets or sets the name of the cost component.

value.description: Gets or sets the value of the cost component.

costType.description: Gets or sets the type of cost (Capex or Opex).

CostPillar.description: Represents the cost pillar a line item belongs to.

CostSummary.description: Summary of application migration, including readiness, cost, and strategies.

azureCostDetails.description: Azure cost details for the applications.

onPremCostDetails.description: On-premises cost details for the applications.

HadrProperties.description: Gets and Sets Sql Azure Settings HadrProperties.

enableHadrAssessment.description: Indicates whether HADR Assessment is enabled.

isInternetAccessAvailable.description: Indicates whether Internet Access is available.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

OverviewSummaryListResult.description: The response of a OverviewSummary list operation.

value.description: The OverviewSummary items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

applicationSummary.description: Summary of custom applications migrated to Azure.

customApplicationSummary.description: Summary of custom applications migrated to Azure.

independentWorkloadsSummary.description: Summary of ungrouped workloads migrated to Azure.

azureArcEnabledOnPremisesCost.description: The total Azure arc enabled on-premises cost assuming all on-premises infra is arc enabled.

futureCostIncludingAzureArc.description: The final cost including azure and azure arc enabled on-premises considering the remaining on-prem infra is arc enabled.

futureEsuSavingsFor4YearsIncludingAzureA.description: ESU Savings in 4 Years considering the remaining on-prem infra each year is arc enabled.

futureManagementCostSavingsIncludingAzur.description: The management cost saving considering the remaining on-prem infra is arc enabled

futureSecurityCostSavingsIncludingAzureA.description: The security cost saving considering the remaining on-prem infra is arc enabled.

azureArcServicesCost.description: The total cost of services offered by azure arc.

futureAzureArcEnabledOnPremisesCost.description: The future azure arc cost based on the final migration percentage.

futureAzureArcServicesCost.description: The total cost of services offered by azure arc based on the final migration percentage.

futureCostDetails.description: Future state cost which includes Azure cost and Arc enabled on-premises cost based on the final migration percentage.

azureArcEnabledOnPremisesCostDetails.description: The Azure arc enabled on-premises cost.

futureAzureArcEnabledOnPremisesCostDetai.description: The final azure arc enabled on-premises cost based on the final migration percentage.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

createdTimestamp.description: Time when this project was created. Date-Time represented in ISO-8601 format.

updatedTimestamp.description:
Time when this project was last updated. Date-Time represented in ISO-8601
format.

serviceEndpoint.description: Endpoint at which the collector agent can call agent REST API.

assessmentSolutionId.description: Assessment solution ARM id tracked by Microsoft.Migrate/migrateProjects.

customerWorkspaceId.description: The ARM id of service map workspace created by customer.

customerWorkspaceLocation.description: Location of service map workspace created by customer.

publicNetworkAccess.description:
This value can be set to 'enabled' to avoid breaking changes on existing
customer resources and templates. If set to 'disabled', traffic over public
interface is not allowed, and private endpoint connections would be the
exclusive access method.

privateEndpointConnections.description: The list of private endpoint connections to the project.

customerStorageAccountArmId.description:
The ARM id of the storage account used for interactions when public access is
disabled.

ProvisioningState.description: The status of the current operation.

ReportStatus.description: Business case supported report status types.

azureSettings.description: Azure settings for a business case.

billingSettings.description: Gets or sets the billing settings.

SqlAzureSettings.description: Gets and Sets Sql Azure Settings.

hadrProperties.description: Gets and Sets Sql Azure Settings.

StrategySummary.description: Summary of migration strategy, including count and cost details.

count.description: Number of workloads using this strategy.

costDetails.description: Cost details for workloads using this strategy.

TotalCostDetails.description: The Cost Details have total Cost, other costs segregation

costLineItems.description: Gets or sets the list of cost line items.

azureArcEnabledOnPremisesCost.description: Year-on-Year azure arc enabled on-premises cost.

futureCost.description: Year-on-Year azure with arc enabled on-premises cost.

futureAzureArcEnabledOnPremisesEsuCost.description: Year-on-Year azure arc enabled on-premises esu cost of the remaining infra on-premises.

futureOnPremisesEsuCost.description: Year-on-Year on-premises esu cost of the remaining infra on-premises.
